parameters.description: What to refactor: 'old-pattern → new-pattern'

parameters.name: file_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated file extensions to search

parameters.description: Execute phases 1-3 only (audit and plan)

parameters.name: manifest
parameters.description: Migration manifest (inline YAML or file path with old→new mappings)

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Directory to audit (default: current directory)

parameters.name: severity_threshold
parameters.description: Minimum severity to report: critical, high, medium, low, all

parameters.name: structure_spec
parameters.description: Path to documented directory structure for optional structure diff layer

parameters.name: template_dir
parameters.description: Path to template directory for optional template smoke test layer

parameters.name: partition
parameters.description: Partition label for parallel orchestration (e.g., 'docs-architecture')

parameters.name: file_filter
parameters.description: Glob pattern to narrow scope within scope directory (e.g., 'docs/architecture/**')

inputs.description: Optional manifest file (alternative to inline YAML)

outputs.name: audit_report
outputs.description: Structured findings report with severity tiers and fix batches

outputs.name: partition_audit_report
outputs.description: Partition-scoped findings report (when partition parameter is set)

outputs.name: run_log
outputs.description: Execution log for this audit run

outputs.description: Index of all audit-migration runs with metadata
